question_text: How many confirmed human cases of H5N1 will be reported in the US by February 28, 2025, according to the US dashboard?
resolution_criteria: The number of cases reported by the US dashboard as of February 28, 2025.
comparison_to_outcome: The forecast was accurate, with the vast majority of forecasters correctly anticipating the case range.
takeaways: The majority of group members agreed on the outcome being in the 70 to 100 case range. This was confirmed by the real-world outcome as well.

question_text: How many livestock herds will be affected by H5N1 in the US by February 28, 2025?
resolution_criteria: The number of affected livestock herds reported by the US dashboard as of February 28, 2025.

takeaways: The group had a strong consensus that the outcome would be within the 970-1000 case range.
